local Hub = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://cdn.jnkie.com/havoc.lua"))()

local function hasFileSystemSupport()
	local hw = pcall(function() return type(writefile) == "function" end)
	local hr = pcall(function() return type(readfile) == "function" end)
	local hi = pcall(function() return type(isfile) == "function" end)
	return hw and hr and hi
end

local fileSystemSupported = hasFileSystemSupport()
local KeyFile = UI_Configs.KeyFile or ""

local function saveVerifiedKey(key)
	if not fileSystemSupported then 
		warn("File system not supported - cannot save key")
		return false 
	end
	local success, err = pcall(function()
		writefile(KeyFile, key)
		print("Key saved successfully to: " .. KeyFile)
	end)
	if not success then
		warn("Failed to save key: " .. tostring(err))
	end
	return success
end

local function loadVerifiedKey()
	if not fileSystemSupported then 
		return nil 
	end
	local success, content = pcall(function()
		return readfile(KeyFile)
	end)
	if not success or not content or content == "" then 
		return nil 
	end
	print("Loaded saved key from: " .. KeyFile)
	return content
end

local function deleteSavedKey()
	if not fileSystemSupported then return false end
	local success, err = pcall(function()
		if isfile(KeyFile) then
			delfile(KeyFile)
			print("Deleted saved key file: " .. KeyFile)
		end
	end)
	return success
end

local function TryAutoLogin()
	if not Junkie_Configs.UseJunkie then return false end
    
	local lib = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://jnkie.com/sdk/library.lua"))()
	lib.service = Junkie_Configs.Service
	lib.identifier = Junkie_Configs.Identifier
	lib.provider = Junkie_Configs.Provider
	
	local savedKey = loadVerifiedKey()
	local keyToCheck = savedKey or getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY
	
	if not keyToCheck or keyToCheck == "" then 
		print("No saved key found")
		return false 
	end
	
	print("Attempting auto-login with key...")
	local result = lib.check_key(keyToCheck)
	
	if result and result.valid then
		if result.message == "KEYLESS" then
			getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = "KEYLESS"
			getgenv().LOAD = true
			print("Auto-login successful (KEYLESS mode)")
		else
			if not savedKey then 
				saveVerifiedKey(keyToCheck) 
			end
			getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = keyToCheck
			getgenv().LOAD = true
			print("Auto-login successful - Key saved")
		end
		return true
	else
		print("Auto-login failed - invalid key")
		if savedKey then
			deleteSavedKey() -- Delete invalid saved key
		end
		return false
	end
end

-- Hook into the hub's success event to save the key when user enters it manually
local function setupKeySaveHook(hub)
	if hub and hub.Events then
		-- Listen for successful key verification
		hub.Events:On("KeyVerified", function(key)
			if key and key ~= "" and key ~= "KEYLESS" then
				saveVerifiedKey(key)
				print("Key saved after manual verification: " .. key)
			end
		end)
	end
end

-- Auto-login attempt
local autoLoginResult = TryAutoLogin()

if not autoLoginResult then
	pcall(function()
		local hub = Hub.new(Config)
		setupKeySaveHook(hub) -- Setup auto-save when user enters key manually
		hub:Init()
	end)
end

-- Wait for load
while not getgenv().LOAD do
	task.wait(0.1)
end

print("Key system loaded successfully!")
